steps.title: Calculate attendees at first and second webinars
steps.content:
46% of the 1,250 people who attended the first webinar also attended the second webinar. Compute this percentage:
$$0.46 \times 1,250 = 575$$
So 575 people attended both the first and second webinars.

steps.title: Calculate attendees at all three webinars
steps.content:
32% of those 575 people who attended both the first and second webinars also attended the third webinar. Compute this percentage:
$$0.32 \times 575 = 184$$
Therefore, 184 people attended all three webinars.
